title: Marks & Spencer India International Enterprises is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Marks & Spencer India International Enterprises is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Marks & Spencer India International Enterprises invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Floor Manager at our Amritsar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Marks & Spencer India International Enterprises:
Marks & Spencer India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Marks & Spencer India International Enterprises!
